title: Ask a question from welcome suggestion and reopen it from history
description: Verifies a user can send a question via a welcome suggestion pill, see loading then a VaultRAG response, and later reopen the same conversation from the history sidebar with messages preserved.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a welcome suggestion pill
Wait for the typing/loading indicator to appear
Wait for a VaultRAG system message to appear
Open the history sidebar
Select the most recent conversation in the list
Verify the chat shows both a user message labeled You and a system message labeled VaultRAG for the reopened conversation

title: Ask a question by typing and submitting with Enter
description: Verifies a user can type a question, submit with the Enter key, see a loading indicator, and then see a VaultRAG response rendered in the chat.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a short question into the chat input field
Press Enter
Wait for the typing/loading indicator to appear
Verify a system message labeled VaultRAG appears after submission

title: Start a new chat after a completed conversation and keep prior thread in recents
description: Verifies that after sending a message and receiving a response, starting a New chat returns the main stage to the welcome/empty state while the prior conversation remains in the recent list.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a short question into the chat input field
Submit the question using the send control
Wait for a VaultRAG system message to appear
Open the history sidebar
Start a new chat from the history sidebar
Verify the main chat returns to the welcome/empty state and the recent conversations list is still populated

title: Switch between two conversations and see each thread load
description: Verifies a user can create two separate conversations and switch between them from the history sidebar, with the chat window updating to the selected thread.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a short question into the chat input field
Submit the question using the send control
Wait for a VaultRAG system message to appear
Open the history sidebar
Start a new chat from the history sidebar
Click a welcome suggestion pill
Wait for a VaultRAG system message to appear
Open the history sidebar
Select the older conversation in the recent list
Verify the chat thread changes to show a different set of messages than the most recent conversation

title: Delete the active conversation and fall back to a safe state
description: Verifies that deleting the currently open conversation updates the list and the main chat safely falls back to either another conversation or the welcome/empty state.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Fill a short question into the chat input field
Submit the question using the send control
Wait for a VaultRAG system message to appear
Open the history sidebar
Delete the currently selected conversation from the list
Verify the main chat shows either the welcome/empty state or a different existing conversation thread

title: Unlock Executive role via confirmation modal
description: Verifies a user can open the Executive unlock flow, confirm in the modal, and see the role chip update to Executive.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the control to unlock Executive mode
Confirm the Executive unlock in the modal
Verify the header role chip shows Executive

title: Delete a conversation from history and remove it from recents
description: Verifies a user can create a conversation, delete it from the history sidebar, and see it removed from the recent list.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click a welcome suggestion pill
Wait for a VaultRAG system message to appear
Open the history sidebar
Delete the most recent conversation from the list
Verify the deleted conversation no longer appears in the recent list

title: Switch back to Employee and attachment controls are not available
description: Verifies attachment controls follow role permissions by becoming unavailable when switching from Executive back to Employee.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the role switch control
Choose the Executive role
Confirm the role switch in the modal
Open the role switch control
Choose the Employee role
Verify file attachment controls are hidden or disabled

title: Prevent sending an empty message
description: Verifies the app does not send a message when the input is empty and the chat remains in the welcome/empty state.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Ensure the chat input is empty
Press Enter
Verify no new user message labeled You appears in the chat

title: Send query with Executive attachments and see them on the user message
description: Verifies an Executive can attach PDF/CSV files to a message and the sent user message displays the attachments.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the role switch control
Choose the Executive role
Confirm the role switch in the modal
Attach one PDF file to the message
Fill a short question into the message input
Submit the message
Verify the latest user message shows attached file(s)

title: Switch back to Employee role from Executive
description: Verifies that after switching to Executive, a user can return to Employee and the role chip updates accordingly.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the control to unlock Executive mode
Confirm the Executive unlock in the modal
Click the control to use the Employee role
Verify the header role chip shows Employee

title: Toggle theme to dark and back to light
description: Verifies the theme toggle switches between light and dark and the toggle’s accessible label reflects the current state.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the theme toggle control
Verify the application theme changes to the opposite mode
Click the theme toggle control again
Verify the application theme returns to the original mode

title: Open history sidebar when there is no prior activity
description: Verifies the history sidebar can be opened on a fresh session and displays the appropriate empty state when there are no conversations.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the history sidebar
Verify an empty state is displayed for the conversation list

title: Attach multiple files in Executive mode and keep them associated with the sent message
description: Verifies multiple PDF/CSV attachments can be added in Executive mode and appear on the resulting user message bubble.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the role switch control
Choose the Executive role
Confirm the role switch in the modal
Attach one PDF file to the message
Attach one CSV file to the message
Fill a short question into the message input
Submit the message
Verify the latest user message shows multiple attachments

title: Cancel Executive unlock and remain in Employee with no attachment access
description: Verifies dismissing the Executive unlock confirmation leaves the user in Employee role and does not expose attachment functionality.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the role switch control
Choose the Executive role
Cancel the role switch in the modal
Verify the role indicator remains Employee
Verify file attachment controls are hidden or disabled

title: Remove an added attachment before sending so it does not appear on the message
description: Verifies a user can undo an attachment selection before submitting and the sent message does not show the removed file.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the role switch control
Choose the Executive role
Confirm the role switch in the modal
Attach one PDF file to the message
Remove the selected attachment from the composer
Fill a short question into the message input
Submit the message
Verify the latest user message shows no attachments

title: Theme toggle is keyboard-operable
description: Verifies a keyboard-only user can focus the theme toggle and activate it to change theme.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Press Tab until the theme toggle control is focused
Press Enter to activate the focused theme toggle
Verify the application theme changes to the opposite mode

title: TTS toggle can be enabled before asking a question
description: Verifies voice output can be toggled on via the UI before submitting a query and the UI reflects it as enabled.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Toggle voice output on
Fill a short question into the message input
Submit the message
Verify voice output is shown as enabled for replies

title: Theme toggle updates its aria-label when switching modes
description: Verifies the theme toggle’s aria-label changes to reflect the action/state after toggling.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Inspect the theme toggle control accessibility label
Click the theme toggle control
Verify the theme toggle accessibility label has changed

title: Microphone control is conditionally available based on browser support
description: Verifies the microphone input control is either present (when supported) or absent (when not supported) without breaking the input bar UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Wait for the input bar to render
Verify the microphone control is either visible or not shown depending on browser capability
